C:\Users\z0044v0v\Downloads\Cmake\cmake-4.2.1-windows-x86_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\ecommerce_store.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\ecommerce_store.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\ecommerce_store.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\ecommerce_store.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ecommerce_store.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libecommerce_store.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\ecommerce_store.dir\linkLibs.rsp
